summary: Iteration 33 — Full regression suite (107/112 pass, identical to iter_32 baseline) + 11 new ledger consistency tests (all pass). Validates atomic find_one_and_update Cloudz refactor: every ledger entry balanceAfter == user.loyaltyPoints in DB, no double-counting.

regression_confirmation.current: 107/112 (same PASSED tests, same false-failure, same 4 skips)
regression_confirmation.verdict: FULL REGRESSION PASSED — no previously-passing test has broken
regression_confirmation.note: First regression run hit 'No products with stock>5' (all products depleted from prior runs). Fixed by adding +100 stock to 5 products via admin API. Second run produced identical 107/112 result.

ledger_consistency_results.SIGNUP_BONUS_NO_DOUBLE_COUNT: PASS — DB loyaltyPoints=500 (not 1000). New code: insert loyaltyPoints=0 + $inc 500 = 500.
ledger_consistency_results.ADMIN_ADJUST_POSITIVE_LEDGER_CONSISTENCY: PASS — pts_before=31353, db_after=31453, ledger.balanceAfter=31453, API.newBalance=31453 (all match)
ledger_consistency_results.ADMIN_ADJUST_NO_DOUBLE_COUNT: PASS — +50 adjust increments by exactly 50 (not 100). Old bug: update_one($inc:50) + log_cloudz_transaction($inc:50) = +100.
ledger_consistency_results.TIER_REDEMPTION_LEDGER_CONSISTENCY: PASS — tier_1 (-1000 pts): ledger.amount=-1000, ledger.balanceAfter=30453 == DB=30453
ledger_consistency_results.PURCHASE_REWARD_NO_DOUBLE_COUNT: PASS — earned=90, delta=90 exactly (not 180). Old bug: update_one($inc:earned) + log_cloudz_transaction($inc:earned) = +2x.

false_failure_analysis.root_cause: Same test-design issue as iter_31/32: test_user has a qualifying paid order from TestAdminOrders::test_admin_update_order_status_to_paid. NOT an API bug.

skipped_analysis.reason: Registration rate limit (5/min) hit after test_user + test_user2 + disposable/merge user registrations
skipped_analysis.note: Same 4 skips as iter_31/32. All verified in prior iterations.

environment_fix_applied.issue: Product stock depleted to 5 (fixture requires stock > 5) from prior test runs
environment_fix_applied.fix: Boosted top 5 products by +100 stock via PATCH /api/products/{id}/stock admin endpoint
environment_fix_applied.impact: First regression run had 24 skips (all 'No products with stock>5'). Second run after restock: 107/112 (correct).
environment_fix_applied.note_for_next_agent: If regression tests show 'No products with stock>5' skips, run the restock script. Products to watch: RYL 35K, CLIO Platinum, Pulse X, TRX, Meloso.

critical_code_review_comments: auth_routes.py line 106: `loyaltyPoints=signup_bonus` hardcodes 500 in response instead of reading from DB post-increment. This is cosmetically fine (always 500) but technically diverges from the DB-authoritative pattern. Minor.

loyalty_routes.py redeem: `remainingPoints` in response = user_points - tier[pointsRequired] (computed from stale pre-transaction user object). Could differ from actual DB if concurrent transactions. Low risk in practice.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_ledger_consistency.py — new file: 11 ledger consistency tests covering all atomic transaction scenarios
seed_data_creation: TEST_lc_* users created and cleaned up during ledger tests. Product stock boosted +100 for 5 products.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter_33: Regression 107/112 (identical to iter_32). Atomic Cloudz refactor verified: all 11 ledger consistency tests pass. Key invariant confirmed: cloudz_ledger.balanceAfter == user.loyaltyPoints for all transaction types (signup_bonus, admin_adjustment, tier_redemption, purchase_reward, referral_signup_bonus, referral_reward). No double-counting in any flow. IMPORTANT: Product stock may deplete from test runs — if 'No products with stock>5' appears, restock via admin API. The test_ledger_consistency.py reuses referral users between tests (avoids hitting 5/min rate limit). Cleanup runs at end.
mocked_apis: Email service is MOCKED — order confirmation emails are silent no-ops.
